response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 15+ years of broad technical experience and some exposure to high-throughput distributed systems, but the resume shows no substantive experience with the core competencies this role demands: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or growth measurement systems. The role is Principal/IC6 and requires deep, demonstrated ownership of experimentation and metrics systems used across multiple teams; the candidate's background is primarily in product engineering, DevOps tooling, and GIS platforms, leaving the most critical requirements unaddressed.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience spanning C/C++, TypeScript, Java, and more, satisfying the technical breadth requirement
High-throughput distributed systems exposure at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests per second with async I/O and low-latency caching)
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq demonstrates adaptability to modern AI-first engineering contexts
concerns: Zero explicit experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flighting, or rollout-risk management — the central requirement of the role
No evidence of statistical analysis, metrics infrastructure design, or data science collaboration that growth/measurement ownership demands
Current trajectory (Senior/Staff IC) is below the Principal/IC6 target; no demonstrated multi-team architectural leadership or cross-org influence at scale
